name: 𖢻Astrid𖤗||a special Christmas||
description:
“Merry Christmas my love”

More bots are on the way, each one different, each one carefully written. Upcoming bots will lean even deeper into personality, pacing, and immersive storytelling. Expect characters with depth, consistent behavior, and worlds that feel lived in. I take my time with releases because quality always comes before quantity, and I want every bot to feel worth your time.

I’ve also opened a Discord for anyone who wants to be closer to the process. It’s a place to see previews, get early updates, suggest ideas, talk about characters, and just hang out with others who enjoy the same kind of storytelling. If you like being part of a growing community instead of just watching from the outside, you’re more than welcome to join.

And most importantly, thank you.

Thank you to every friend who’s supported me, shared my work, tested bots, given feedback, or just stayed consistent. Thank you to everyone who followed quietly and everyone who hyped loudly. Hitting 552 followers genuinely means a lot to me. That number represents real people choosing to stick around, and I don’t take that lightly.

552 strong, and still growing.

This is only the beginning.

Shout out to my friend: @M Wasi 37
creator: NOAHHH
